name: 4.6"x7.2" Monstera Artificial Plant - Room Essentials™
description:
Enjoy the beauty of the outdoors with this Monstera Artificial Plant from Room Essentials™. This natural-looking faux monstera plant brings a lively vibe to your home decor, and it comes potted inside a white melamine container with faux soil for easy display on any flat surface. Plus, it stays beautiful at all times without the hassle and worry of maintenance.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
